bugs.title: Integration branch missing Phase 2 code (wrong base branch)
bugs.description: Integration branch was created from 'main' instead of 'origin/idpbuilder-oci-push/phase2/integration', causing all Phase 2 code to be missing.

error_details.build_error: Phase 2 modules not found in integration branch
error_details.root_cause: Wrong base branch used during integration branch creation

bugs.root_cause: Integration branch created from wrong base (main instead of Phase 2 integration)

bugs.title: Integration tests use incorrect import paths for pkg/cmd/push
bugs.description: Test files import 'github.com/cnoe-io/idpbuilder/cmd/push' but correct path is 'github.com/cnoe-io/idpbuilder/pkg/cmd/push' (missing /pkg/ prefix)

error_details.build_error: go: github.com/cnoe-io/idpbuilder/test/integration imports github.com/cnoe-io/idpbuilder/cmd/push: no matching versions for query "latest"

bugs.root_cause: Phase 3 Wave 1 efforts used incorrect import path - missing /pkg/ prefix. The push package exists at pkg/cmd/push/ not cmd/push/.
bugs.recommended_fix: Update import statements in affected test files to use correct path with /pkg/ prefix
bugs.upstream_effort_needed: Fix in effort-3.1.3 and effort-3.1.4 branches
